description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a skeletonized folding stock for compact storage and maneuverability. The upper receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, while the handguard has a ribbed texture for improved grip. The barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments, and is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The rifle uses a detachable box magazine, which is inserted just in front of the trigger guard. Iron sights are mounted on both the front and rear of the receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for weight reduction and durability.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a folding skeletonized stock, ribbed handguard, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The short barrel and flash hider make it ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flash hider, narrow barrel profile, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, folding skeletonized stock, ribbed handguard, detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock structure, pistol grip, and the rear sight alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
